draft_message: CRITICAL: RTO/RPO breach risk observed. Failover sim threw DNS/NXDOMAIN errors. Immediate triage underway; pipeline frozen. Expect service impact if primary region fails.
Heads-up: backup_verify OK but rto_rpo_check warns RPO drift (15m). Please pause nonessential changes; we'll tune schedules after root cause analysis.
We experienced a simulated failover error due to DNS propagation issues. No current outage, but we are investigating and will share updates.
